mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.deleted = 0

SELECT m.*, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar, ru.nickname AS reply_user_nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `user` ru ON m.reply_user_id = ru.id WHERE m.product_id = #{productId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time ASC

SELECT m.*, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.product_id = #{productId} AND m.parent_id = 0 AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time DESC

SELECT m.*, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.avatar AS user_avatar, ru.nickname AS reply_user_nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN `user` u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `user` ru ON m.reply_user_id = ru.id WHERE m.parent_id = #{parentId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (product_id, user_id, parent_id, reply_user_id, content) VALUES (#{productId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{replyUserId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE message SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
